message:
feat(ui): add interactive dependency graph visualization

Implement a new TUI view for visualizing issue dependencies as a
directed acyclic graph (DAG), accessible via the 'g' key.

New GraphModel component (pkg/ui/graph.go):
- Layered graph layout using topological sorting algorithm
- Nodes positioned by dependency depth (roots at layer 0)
- Cycle detection prevents infinite loops in circular dependencies
- ASCII box-drawing for node rendering with status-colored borders
- Edge drawing with arrows showing dependency direction
- Scrollable canvas for large graphs (H/L for horizontal, PgUp/PgDn)
- Node selection with keyboard navigation (h/j/k/l)
- Optional insights integration for highlighting critical nodes

Graph layout algorithm:
- Build adjacency list from blocking dependencies only
- Compute in-degree for each node (dependencies pointing to it)
- BFS from zero in-degree nodes assigns layer numbers
- Handle cycles by assigning remaining nodes to layer 0
- Sort nodes within layers alphabetically for consistency

Rendering features:
- Node boxes show: ID, truncated title, status indicator
- Selected node highlighted with accent border color
- Dependency edges drawn as horizontal/vertical ASCII lines
- Arrow heads (▶/◀/▼/▲) indicate direction
- Scroll position indicators in corners
- Insights-highlighted nodes marked with star (★)

Integration in Model (pkg/ui/model.go):
- New focusGraph state and isGraphView flag
- 'g' key toggles graph view from any context
- handleGraphKeys() for graph-specific navigation
- Enter key jumps to selected issue in list view
- Graph updated via SetIssues() when filters change
- Help overlay documents graph view keybindings
- Footer shows context-appropriate key hints

Test coverage (pkg/ui/graph_test.go):
- TestGraphModelEmpty: nil selection for empty graph
- TestGraphModelSingleNode: single node navigation
- TestGraphModelLayerAssignment: dependency chain layering
- TestGraphModelEdgeDirection: correct edge orientation
- TestGraphModelCycleDetection: cycles don't cause hangs
- TestGraphModelNavigation: node selection movement
- TestGraphModelScrollBounds: scroll clamping
- TestGraphModelSetIssuesClearsGraph: data refresh
- TestGraphModelWithInsights: insights integration
- TestGraphModelViewRendering: various dimension inputs
- TestGraphModelIgnoresNonBlockingDeps: only blocks create edges
- TestGraphModelMissingDependency: graceful missing node handling
- TestGraphModelMultipleRoots: disconnected subgraphs
- TestGraphModelLongTitle: title truncation
- TestGraphModelStatusColors: all statuses render correctly

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
